results.title: AMD Downgraded by Northland Capital Markets -- Rating Changed to Market Perform

SA analyst upgrades/downgrades: PLTR, AMD, MAT, PINS | Seeking Alpha
AMD Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026

summary: April 27: Northland Capital Markets downgraded AMD to Market Perform from Outperform, PT $260. Recent upgrades: DA Davidson to Buy (PT $375), Envision Research to Buy (agentic AI positioning), Susquehanna reiterated Buy (PT $375). 34-analyst consensus: Buy.
